error.invalid_auth: Login failed — see error details below and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Connection issue — see details below. Submit again to save anyway.
error.invalid_code: No authorization code was found in what you pasted.
error.no_printer_selected: Please select a printer or enter a UUID.
error.no_printers: Connected but no printers found. See details below.

user.title: Prusa Connect
user.description: Choose how to connect to your Prusa printer.

local.title: PrusaLink (Local Connection)
local.description:
Connect directly to your printer on the local network.

Find the API key in your printer's web interface at **http://your-printer-ip** → Settings → API Key.

cloud.title: Prusa Connect (Cloud Login)
cloud.description: Choose how to sign in to your Prusa account.

menu_options.cloud_browser: Browser login (use if you have two-factor auth)

cloud_password.title: Prusa Account Login
cloud_password.description:
Sign in with your Prusa account. Your password is used once to obtain access tokens and is **not stored** — only the tokens are saved.

If your account uses two-factor authentication, go back and choose **Browser login** instead.

cloud_browser.title: Prusa Connect (Browser Login)
cloud_browser.description:
**Step 1.** Open the login link and sign in with your Prusa account, then approve access.

**Step 2.** Your browser will try to open a `prusaslicer://login…` link and show an error — that's expected. Copy the **entire URL** from the address bar (it contains `?code=…`) and paste it below. You can also paste just the code value.

Tip: if your browser hides the URL, open the link on a device that does **not** have PrusaSlicer installed (e.g. your phone), where the full `prusaslicer://login?code=…` will be shown.

[Log in to Prusa Connect]({authorize_url})

data.auth_code: Pasted redirect URL or authorization code

select_printer.title: Select Printer
select_printer.description: Select the printer you want to add to Home Assistant.

init.title: Prusa Connect Configuration
init.description: Update your connection settings. Changes reload the integration automatically. For cloud connections, tick "Re-authenticate" to log in again.

data.reauth: Re-authenticate (log in to Prusa account again)

reauth.title: Re-authenticate with Prusa Connect
reauth.description:
Open the login link, sign in, then paste the redirect URL (or code) below.

[Log in to Prusa Connect]({authorize_url})

data.auth_code: Pasted redirect URL or authorization code
